result.summary: Found 1 major issue: navigation tab text is truncated/cut off in the main navigation menu.

issues.description: The 'Hot Gar' navigation tab text is visually truncated. This should likely read 'Hot Games' but the full text is cut off, suggesting a responsive design or container sizing problem.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width, font size, or use text wrapping to ensure all navigation items display their complete labels without truncation. Consider reviewing the responsive breakpoints for mobile/tablet views.
